PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO EXTEND JURISDICTION OF ARBITRATOR IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS ORDERE EXTENDED TO 4/1/2005. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. THE ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS RE-SET TO 5/5/2005 AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARL SAUCEDA, CSR#2031. (212)

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT PLAINTIFF, ORLANDO MARTINEZ RECOVER NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SANDRA YU BY WAY OF THIS ARBITRATION PROCEEDING. EACH PARTY IS TO BEAR HIS OR HER OWN COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEYS' FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
